mapper.select:
/* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.interview.getMyInterviewRequests Description : 배정되지 않은 면담을 보여준다. (가장 오래된 신청부터) Rule: - 대표(2): ITV_PIC_AUTHRT = 2 - 직원(3): ITV_PIC_AUTHRT = 3 - 강사(4): ITV_PIC_AUTHRT = 4 - 공통: COHORT_SN = cohortSn -> 여기 샵 괄호 이런거 쓰면 에러뜸 사용 ㄴㄴ */ SELECT i.ITV_SN AS itvSn, i.COHORT_SN AS cohortSn, i.ITV_APLY_TTL AS itvAplyTtl, i.ITV_APLY_CN AS itvAplyCn, i.ITV_APLY_DT AS itvAplyDt, i.ITV_PIC_AUTHRT AS itvPicAutht, i.ITV_PIC_SN AS itvPicSn, i.ITV_APLCNT_SN AS itvAplcntSn, i.ITV_PRNMNT_DT AS itvPrnmntDt, i.ITV_PLC AS itvPlc, i.PIC_CAL_SN AS picCalSn, i.APLCNT_CAL_SN AS aplcntCalSn FROM TB_INTERVIEW i WHERE 1=1 AND i.COHORT_SN = #{cohortSn} AND i.ITV_PIC_AUTHRT = #{roleType} AND i.ITV_PRNMNT_DT IS NULL -- 이거 값 있으면 면담 배정 끝난거임 AND i.DEL_YN = 0
ORDER BY i.ITV_APLY_DT ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_INTERVIEW SET VIEW_CNT = VIEW_CNT + 1 WHERE ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND DEL_YN = 0

/* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.interview.confirmInterview Description : 면담 확정 (기존 컬럼 수정) 작성자 : 김동식 */ UPDATE TB_INTERVIEW i SET i.ITV_PRNMNT_DT = #{itvPrnmntDt}, i.ITV_PLC = #{itvPlc}, i.ITV_PIC_SN = #{itvPicSn}, i.ITV_CFMTN_DT = NOW(), i.ITV_PIC_ANS = #{itvPicAns} WHERE i.ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND i.ITV_PIC_SN IS NULL AND i.DEL_YN = 0
mapper.select: /* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.interview.selectInterviewParticipants Description : itvSn으로 ITV_PIC_SN, ITV_APLCNT_SN 조회 작성자 : 김동식 */ SELECT ITV_PIC_SN, ITV_APLCNT_SN FROM TB_INTERVIEW WHERE ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND DEL_YN = 0
mapper.update: /* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.interview.confirmInterview Description : 면담 확정 (기존 컬럼 수정) 작성자 : 김동식 */ UPDATE TB_INTERVIEW i SET i.ITV_PRNMNT_DT = #{itvPrnmntDt}, i.ITV_PLC = #{itvPlc}, i.ITV_PIC_SN = #{itvPicSn}, i.ITV_CFMTN_DT = NOW(), i.ITV_PIC_ANS = #{itvPicAns} WHERE i.ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND i.ITV_PIC_SN IS NULL AND i.DEL_YN = 0

/* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.interview.updateCalendarSn Description : 캘린더 일정 2명 만들어지면 만들어진 일정 번호 각각 집어넣음. 작성자 : 김동식 */ UPDATE TB_INTERVIEW i SET i.PIC_CAL_SN = #{picCalSn}, i.APLCNT_CAL_SN = #{aplcntCalSn} WHERE 1=1 AND i.ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND i.PIC_CAL_SN IS NULL AND i.APLCNT_CAL_SN IS NULL
mapper.select: /* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.interview.getCoSnAndCohortSnByItvSn Description : 해당 면담 글에 조회 가능한지 체크하기위해 itvSn으로 coSn,cohortSn 조회 작성자 : 김동식 */ SELECT CO_SN as coSn, COHORT_SN as cohortSn FROM TB_INTERVIEW WHERE ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND DEL_YN = 0

/* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.interview.readInterviewbyItvSn Description : itvSn으로 글 상세보기. TB_USER이랑 조인해서 이름 리턴해줌 작성자 : 김동식 */ SELECT i.ITV_SN AS itvSn, i.CO_SN AS coSn, i.COHORT_SN AS cohortSn, i.ITV_APLY_TTL AS itvAplyTtl, i.ITV_APLY_CN AS itvAplyCn, i.ITV_APLY_DT AS itvAplyDt, i.ITV_PIC_AUTHRT AS itvPicAutht, i.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, u.USER_NM AS itvAplcntNm, u2.USER_NM AS itvAplcntSn, i.FORM_UUID AS formUuid, i.ITV_PRNMNT_DT AS itvPrnmntDt, -- 확정일시 i.ITV_PLC AS itvPlc, -- 면담장소 i.ITV_PIC_ANS AS itvPicAns -- 담당자 코멘트
-- i.ITV_APLCNT_SN AS itvAplcntSn -- 작성자 FROM TB_INTERVIEW i JOIN TB_USER u ON i.ITV_APLCNT_SN = u.USER_SN LEFT JOIN TB_USER u2 ON u2.USER_SN = i.ITV_PIC_SN -- LEFT JOIN TB_FILE f ON i.FORM_UUID = f.FORM_UUID WHERE i.ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND i.DEL_YN = 0
mapper.update: /* soft delete (확정 전에만 삭제 가능) */ UPDATE TB_INTERVIEW SET DEL_YN = 1 WHERE 1=1 AND ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND DEL_YN = 0 -- 삭제 안된 글만 삭제 가능 AND ITV_CFMTN_DT IS NULL -- 확정이면 이거 채워져있기때문에 확정이면 삭제 불가능.
mapper.select: SELECT ITV_PRNMNT_DT FROM TB_INTERVIEW WHERE 1=1 AND ITV_SN = #{itvSn}
